EU Country Group Analysis

Metrics:

Data Sources
MetricSourceYear
GDPIMF World Economic Outlook2023
PopulationUN / Eurostat2023
AreaISO / UN Statistics Division—
Military PowerGlobal Firepower Index (inverted, normalised FR=1.0)2026
Industrial StrengthWorld Bank / UNIDO — Manufacturing Value Added (USD bn)2022
Agricultural OutputFAO — Gross Agricultural Production Value (USD bn)2022

Cyprus, Malta military scores estimated from regional peers. Kosovo may not render on map (no official ISO numeric code). All values are approximate and for comparative purposes only.
